summary: Iteration 34 Testing - Contract Generation Auto-Fill & Booking Flow Navigation verified. Backend tests confirm auto-fill of client identity (nationality, license, license_issued, license_valid, DOB) and vehicle fields (plate, color, chassis). Frontend tests confirm complete-contract page displays pre-filled fields and proper navigation flow.

POST /api/admin/contracts/generate - Cli.details: Auto-fills client_nationality=Suisse, client_license=GE-123456, client_license_issued=2015-03-01, client_license_valid=2027-03-01, client_dob=1990 - Geneve from client's identity fields

POST /api/admin/contracts/generate - Veh.details: Auto-fills vehicle_plate=GE 6E750, vehicle_color=Bleu Metallise, vehicle_chassis=VF1A008DF48C17043 from vehicle's fields

GET /api/contracts/by-reservation/{reser.details: Returns contract by reservation ID, 404 for non-existent

Frontend: Booking Flow Navigation.details: submitReservation() in book.tsx generates contract and navigates to /agency-app/complete-contract?contract_id=X&reservation_id=Y&month=YYYY-MM (line 231-235)

Frontend: Signature Modal.details: Faire signer le client button opens modal with signature canvas, Effacer and Confirmer la signature buttons

Frontend: Voir sur le planning Button.details: After signing, shows 'Voir sur le planning' button that navigates to /agency-app/reservations?highlight={reservation_id}&month={month} (line 160-175 in complete-contract.tsx)

test_classes: TestClientIdentityFieldsInContract - 1 test (verify client has identity fields)
TestContractGenerateAutoFill - 2 tests (client identity + vehicle fields auto-fill)
TestExistingContractAutoFill - 1 test (existing contract has client fields)

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/complete_contract_autofill.png - Contract page showing pre-filled vehicle and client fields

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All flows verified via Playwright and code inspection

seed_data_creation: Used existing test reservation 4959ee99 with BMW Series 3 vehicle and client b5a5d170 who has identity fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract generation auto-fill fully implemented and tested. Backend auto-fills client identity (nationality, license, license_issued, license_valid, DOB) and vehicle fields (plate, color, chassis). Frontend booking flow navigates to /agency-app/complete-contract with contract_id, reservation_id, month params. Contract page displays all pre-filled editable fields. After signing, 'Voir sur le planning' button navigates to /agency-app/reservations with highlight and month params.
notes: All requested features for booking→contract→planning flow are working correctly.
